name: Synthesis Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Synthesis Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, sells, and services smart ID authentication terminals and industrial application software in China. The company offers ID authentication devices/terminals, in-counter clearance settlement/over-the-counter settlement/paperless office terminals, mobile integrated pad and multi-functional matched terminals, bank-hospital self-service devices, clinic-room payment terminals, conglomerate payment modules and e-scales, face-ID matching authentication devices/terminals, and industrial service robots. It also provides counter real name authentication, ID authentication over internet, telecommunication real name system and paperless service, digital community, livelihood e-station, quick payment, and computer vision services, as well as intelligent upgrading of self-service equipment and knowledge management systems. The company was formerly known as Shandong Synthesis Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Synthesis Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. in January 2016. Synthesis Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is based in Jinan, China.
